heading: Refunding bonds excluded temporarily in computing indebtedness
label: 745b Refunding bonds excluded temporarily in computing indebtedness
text: Any bonds or other obligations of Puerto Rico issued after , for the purpose of retiring previously outstanding bonds or obligations shall not be included in computing the public indebtedness of Puerto Rico under , until six months after their issue.August 3, 1935section 745 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act which comprises this chapter.
